title: School SMP (by SyanicXD)
description: All the mods included in the "School SMP"
body:
# For School SMP by syanicxd
The mods/shaders/texturepacks included in this modpack belong to their respective creators, I do not own any rights to claim them as mine.

The mods I took from CurseForge-

- [overrides/mods/mowziesmobs-1.5.27.jar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs) [Credited, under it's [license](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs#license)]
- [overrides/mods/smallships-1.16.5-1.10.1.jar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/small-ships) [`alowed to use the Small Ships Mod in any kind of modpack, as long as you link back to this page`]
- [overrides/mods/subwild-1.3.1.jar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/subterranean-wilderness/files/3166541) [Credited, under it's license [CC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/subterranean-wilderness/files/3166541#license)]
  
And other mods/shaders/texturepacks are from Modrinth only.
